title: Usopp's Face Breaks the Spell
description: Pages 2–6 focus on usopp's face breaks the spell, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Trebol, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as usopp's desperate scream causes Sugar to faint, turning Dressrosa's toys back into people and shattering Doflamingo's hidden order.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The officers' tower is in pieces!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's going on?! A duck suddenly came crashing through the roof!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Leo and the others have been cap- Tured....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There are still more of you out there, NNN- nyeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's right! Don't tell him a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Let's get out of here while we still can, Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The truth is, he's a friend of mine. Now, what was his name again...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: little fool!! He's not my friend at all, nyehhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Is the one-legged soldier with you as well?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Oh. Well, if you know, there's no point hiding it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I'm starting to get a good picture of how this is all connected, nnny- ehhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter what you know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: We will take our comrades back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Retreat at once!! This is too much for your people!!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: You can't hope to match Trebol....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: We have to com- plete...the SOP operation... as quickly as possible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Once we do...the captain will defeat Doflamingo for sure!! We have to hurry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: The captain is waiting for us!!!

summary: Usopp's Face Breaks the Spell focuses on Trebol, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as usopp's desperate scream causes Sugar to faint, turning Dressrosa's toys back into people and shattering Doflamingo's hidden order.
